overview: Routine Health & Hormone provides hormone replacement therapy, specialty injections, and IV infusions with flexible delivery options. Patients can receive weekly in-clinic injections or choose home-based self-injection for ongoing treatment.
highlights: Home-based self-injection or weekly in-clinic hormone administration
IV therapy for immune support, fitness recovery, and hydration
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized hormone therapy and wellness support with flexible in-home or in-clinic treatment options.
